description: Optimize system prompts for top 5 council agents to maximize voice authenticity, actionability, distinctiveness, knowledge depth, and versatility

eval_criteria.voice_authenticity: Does the prompt make the AI truly sound like this copywriter?
eval_criteria.actionability: Does the prompt produce usable copy, not just theory?
eval_criteria.distinctiveness: Would you know which copywriter wrote this without being told?
eval_criteria.knowledge_depth: Does the prompt leverage the copywriter's specific techniques/frameworks?
eval_criteria.versatility: Can the prompt handle different content types (emails, headlines, sales pages)?

mutation_strategy: analyze weakest criteria, make targeted improvements
